nodes.name: 西牛背鹭
nodes.summary: 西牛背鹭（Ardea ibis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如西牛背鹭。

nodes.name: 西牛背鹭
nodes.summary: 西牛背鹭（Western cattle egret，学名 Ardea ibis），主要分布于惠普斯奈德动物园。
nodes.shortSummary: 西牛背鹭（學名：Bubulcus ibis，台湾作西方牛背鷺），又稱西方黃頭鷺，是鹈形目鹭科牛背鷺屬的一个种。 特征 身长约51cm，与其他鹭的区别在体型较粗壮，颈较短而头圆，嘴较短厚。

links.key: bird-西牛背鹭-876209ef__distributed_in__loc-惠普斯奈德动物园-97490805
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Numerous birds were also released by Whipsnade Zoo in England, but the species was never established. Although the cattle egret sometimes feeds in shallow water, unlike most herons it is typically found in fields and dry grassy habitats, reflecting its greater dietary reliance on terrestrial insects rather than aquatic prey
